patterns.title: Jun 12 was the busiest insight day
patterns.body: 4 generated insights in the current 30-day window.

patterns.title: Depth signal
patterns.body: Users averaged about 2.3 inputs per generated insight in the last 30 days.

patterns.title: Retention pulse
patterns.body: 25% of users have returned across multiple weeks.

patterns.title: Most engaged recently

patterns.title: Win-back opportunity
